title: Artificial Intelligence Solutions
excerpt: AI chatbots, AI agents, LLM integrations, RAG systems, and automation bots tailored to real business data.
body: ADT SoftTech builds practical AI systems for support, lead capture, internal knowledge search, automation, and decision support.
pricingNote: Custom pricing based on scope, integrations, and support needs.
homepageShortDescription: Build AI assistants and automation systems around your data and workflows.
shortHeroDescription: AI systems that answer, automate, recommend, and support teams using your business context.
longIntroHeading: Build AI that fits the way your business actually works
longIntroDescription: We design AI workflows around your data, users, approvals, integrations, and business goals. The focus is useful delivery: reliable answers, cleaner handoffs, practical automation, and measurable time savings.
